hero.subtitle: We love anime. We love the craft. AI is changing how it's made, and we want everyone to be able to create their own worlds.

vision.label: OUR VISION
vision.statement: AI is changing how anime gets made. We're here for it.
vision.body: We're a group of people who grew up on anime and want to make our own. AI makes that possible now. We research the tools, create original work, and share what we learn along the way.
vision.pillar1Desc: Studying what works in AI animation, character design, and storytelling.
vision.pillar2Desc: Making original anime with the best tools available today.
vision.pillar3Desc: Tutorials, workflows, and tools for anyone who wants to try.

blog.label: BLOG
blog.comingSoon: Nothing here yet. We'll start writing soon.

beta.label: BETA
beta.title: Sign up for the beta
beta.description: Enter your email and X handle. After you confirm, you are on the list—we will follow up when early access is ready.
beta.successBody: Thanks for signing up. We have your email and X handle on file and will be in touch soon.

errors.twitterInvalid: Enter a valid X handle (letters, numbers, underscore; max 15 characters).
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

join.label: JOIN US
join.headline: Enter the Forge
join.body: Come hang out. Share your work, learn from others, and build something cool with us.
